raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tas KUNGS irr faɯu Al-
tari atmēttis/ Wiꞥſch irr faɯu
wehtu Weetn iṣnihzinajs/ tohs
Muheus wiꞥnas skaistu Nain-
nu irr Wiꞥſch Eenaidneekem
Rohkā dewis/ tee irr eekſch ta
KUNGA Namnaweenu Balſ-
ni pazehluſchi/ itt ka kahdā
Swehtku Deenā.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tas KUNGS irr doh-
najs to Muhrī tahs Zianas
Meitas famaitaht/ Wiꞥſch irr to
Mehra-Aukli ( pahr to ) wilzis/
awn Rohku Wiꞥſch ne irr at-
greesis/ kamehr Wiꞥſch to ap-
ihtu/ un Wiꞥſch irr to Preeksch-
Muhrī ar to Muhrī koẖrā ap-
vehdinajs/ tee irr wahji tappu-
cht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wiꞥnas Wahrtis irr sem-
ne grimmufchas/ Wiꞥſch irr
wiꞥnas Aiṣchauijamus maitajs
in fatreezis/ wiꞥnas Rehninisch/
in wiꞥnas Leeli-Kungi irr starp
cem Paganeem bes Baufslibas/
r wiꞥnas Praweeschi ne atrohd
vais Parahdischanu no ta
tUNGĀ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tee Wezzajee tahs Zia-
as Meitas fehſch pee Semmes/
n zeefch kluffu/ tee mett Pihsch-
us us fawn Galwu/ irr Matſus
pjobsſicht/ tahs Jumprawas
o Jerusalemes nokarr fawu
Galwu pee Semmes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Mannas Azzis irr zaɯr
Aarahm iṣebſtas/ mannas
eekſchas irr faju fkkuschas/ man-
as Aknis irr pee Semmes is-
attitas/ tahs Satreekschanas
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Rad tee uhs fawahm
Mahteim fafka: Kur irr Labbi-
ba un Wihts? kad tee us Pils-
fahta Eelahm pamirst ka No-
fautee/ kad tee tawas Dwehfe-
les iṣlaisch fawo Mahtu Klehpi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kahdu Leezibu warru es
tew atmest? ar ko warru es tewi
lihdsinaht/ tu Jerusalemes Mei-
ta? ar ko warru es tewi lihdsī-
naht/ ka es tewi eepreezinaju/
ak Jumprawa/ tu Zianas Mei-
ta! Jo tawa Satreekschana irr
tik leela ka ta Juha/ kas warr
tewi dseedinaht?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tawi Praueeschi irr tew
Neleetibu un applamas Parah-
dischanas fluddinafschi/ un ne irr
tew tawu Noseegumu finnamu
darrijschi/ ka tee tawu Zeetunnu
nogreestu/ bet irr tew neleetas
Nastas fluddinafschi/ zaur ko tu
taptu tsdsihta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiſti/ kas tewi fezzen
eet/ plaufschkina ar Rohkahm
pahr tewi/ tee fwilpe/ un tratta
fawu Galwu pahr to Jerusa-
lemes Meitu/ (un faffa:) Ir-
rag schis tas Pilsfahts/ no ka
fazzihts tappe? To eſſam to wiſ-
fuskafsku/ un wiſtas Semmes
Preeku?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiſfi tawi Eenaidneeki
atpleſch fawu Mutti pahr tewi/
fwilpe/ un graifa ar Sobbein/
un faffa: Mchs eſſam to aprih-
juschi.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
